howToRedeem.title: How to Redeem Codes
howToRedeem.step1: Launch Haze Seas in Roblox and click the Menu button on the left side of your screen.
howToRedeem.step2: Press the red gift box icon button that pops up.
howToRedeem.step3: Type your code into the field and hit Redeem.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I redeem codes in Haze Seas?
faq.a1: Launch the game in Roblox, open the Menu, click the gift box icon, enter the code, and press Redeem.
faq.q2: How often are new codes released?
faq.a2: New codes are typically released during major updates, milestones, and developer streams. Follow the official Discord and YouTube for announcements.
faq.q3: Why is my code not working?
faq.a3: Codes are case-sensitive. Make sure you enter them exactly as shown. If a code still doesn't work, it may have expired — check the snapshot date above.
faq.a4: Follow the official Haze Studios Discord, YouTube channel, and X (@Haze_Seas) for the latest code drops.

footer.disclaimer: Fan-made guide — not affiliated with Haze Studios. Data snapshot Jul 9, 2026 ET.
